items.title: Closures and lifetime: reject the invalid model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this JavaScript: Language and Browser Applications misconception? A closure stores a frozen copy of every captured primitive at creation time.
hints: Compare both options with platform semantics and observable user or browser evidence.

feedback.correct: Correct. Closures retain bindings, not automatic frozen snapshots; later updates to the binding can be observed.
feedback.incorrect: That preserves the misconception. Closures retain bindings, not automatic frozen snapshots; later updates to the binding can be observed.
